name: Meta Business Suite: How to Use
description: Learn how to use Meta Business Suite with our comprehensive guide. Optimize your business management and streamline operations today.
main_title: Meta Business Suite: How to Use
richtext:
Meta Business Suite is great for managing your Facebook and Instagram pages for your brand. You can schedule posts, manage message, create ads, and much more. But Using Meta Business Suite can be tricky, especially if you’re new at it. Here’s a comprehensive guide to how to use Meta Business Suite.

Here’s what the home page should look like. From here, you can see your recent posts and ads at-a-glance, including recent performance! You can create posts and ads, and see how your performance is trending.

‍

Let’s navigate through the navigation bar at the left.

‍

Clicking on Notifications will show you high priority and other alerts. 

‍

The icon below notifications shows you your inbox, where you can respond to and manage messages.

‍

Going down the list, you can also manage your posts and stories, view your calendar to see planned posts, and manage ads and insights!

‍

Clicking “All tools” at the bottom will show you more things you can do with your account. The most-used tool is probably “Page settings”, where you can manage page roles and manage other business information (like your bio and more).

‍

There’s lots to do under page settings. You can view your settings at-a-glance and change and remove various page roles. You can also see your followers, check messages, and more.

Using Meta Business Suite to manage your business doesn’t have to be hard! When used properly, Meta Business Suite is quite helpful for managing your business’ Facebook and Instagram pages.

‍

Check out our other tutorials for more in-depth guides on how to use Meta Business Suite!
